title: Amtech – Pin Hammer, Precision Tool for Upholstery and Fine Fixing Jobs, Lightweight with Drop Forged Head and Durable Hardwood Shaft (4oz/110g)
features: SMALL HAMMER CONTROL: Compact hammer format for light striking, fixing and household repair tasks.
FOR DETAIL WORK: Suitable for pins, tacks and smaller fixings where accuracy matters.
HANDY DIY ESSENTIAL: Ideal for toolboxes, home projects and quick maintenance jobs.
DROP-FORGED STEEL: Drop-forged construction supports durability and consistent performance under repeated use.
SECURE HANDLING: Designed for confident grip and improved control during use.
description: From the manufacturer About us Amtech is a DK Tools brand and the company has been established for over 30 years. We started life as a family run market stall in London and now our know-how has been optimised across our vast range of tools for the home, garage and garden. We pride ourselves on assisting our customers with their do-it-yourself decision making process, because we are passionate about offering the right tools at the right prices. Our business has been built over the years on the foundations of our 3 core company values, Honesty, Integrity and Trust.
